name: City Of Boston

description_long: City of Boston Credit Union's website (cityofbostoncu.org) is currently inaccessible, returning a 403 Forbidden error that prevents retrieval of essential company information. Based on the domain and current categorization as a credit union, this entity appears to be positioned as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving Boston residents, consistent with the credit-unions category. However, without access to the actual website content, no verified details about their specific offerings, membership requirements, loan products, or service areas can be confirmed. The 403 error suggests either temporary server issues, IP-based access restrictions, or the website being temporarily offline. To generate an accurate and factual company profile, direct website access or alternative verified sources would be required.
